title: Frame structure for a physical control channel
abstract: A method of operating a serving point includes communicating a frame between the serving point and at least one station (STA), the frame including at least a first preamble and a second preamble, the first preamble including at least a first short training field (STF) and a legacy STF, the second preamble including at least a second STF, the legacy STF being orthogonal to the first STF and the second STF.
claims:
Claims ( 21 ) AĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â operatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â accessĂ‚Â pointĂ‚Â comprising: communicatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â frameĂ‚Â betweenĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â accessĂ‚Â pointĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â stationĂ‚Â (STA)Ă‚Â ,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â frameĂ‚Â includingĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â preamble,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â payload,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â preamble,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â payload,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â preambleĂ‚Â includingĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â legacyĂ‚Â shortĂ‚Â trainingĂ‚Â fieldĂ‚Â (STF)Ă‚Â ,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â preambleĂ‚Â includingĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â STF,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â legacyĂ‚Â STFĂ‚Â beingĂ‚Â orthogonalĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â STF.
